description: Every Tesla mobile-API feature, plus offline charging history and a SQLite-backed vehicle log no other Tesla CLI has

auth_env_var_specs.name: TESLA_AUTH_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Tesla iOS-app OAuth bearer token (8-hour TTL). Mint via tesla auth login.

novel_features.name: Ready-to-drive composite
novel_features.description: Single yes/no answer to "can I leave in 5 minutes?" with reasoned blocker list - SOC vs trip distance, plugged-in, doors closed, sentry off, cabin within 3F of target, no mid-install update

novel_features.name: Charging cost ledger
novel_features.description: Per-session cost, monthly spend, home-vs-Supercharger ratio with tariff-window aware $/kWh

novel_features.name: Cost counterfactual
novel_features.description: "If you had only charged at home you would have saved $X over the last 90 days." Re-runs charge rows with home $/kWh substituted for Supercharger sessions

novel_features.name: Supercharger queue watch
novel_features.description: Single-poll snapshot of free stalls at a saved Supercharger; --watch repeats every N seconds with JSON-lines transitions

novel_features.name: Drive-and-charge timeline
novel_features.description: Stitched drives + charges from synced vehicle_states polls - start/end, distance, energy, efficiency, address-resolved lat/lng

novel_features.name: Vampire-drain monitor
novel_features.description: SOC delta vs idle time, flags suspicious sentry sessions or app-wake events

novel_features.name: Keys audit
novel_features.description: Lists every enrolled key with last-seen, role, form-factor; flags keys not seen >90d as stale candidates for removal

novel_features.name: Reachability doctor
novel_features.description: Detects signed-command-required errors, classifies the vehicle as REST-friendly vs signed-command-required, prints tesla-control enrollment URL when needed
